programme.desc: Steve calls on Lloyd when he finds himself stranded at Roy's after his night with Becky. A pent-up Carla learns Liam is coming home and Gail announces she's going to visit Sarah.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Drama series. Nick appears to be uninterested when there is a spate of petrol thefts in the village, and Blaketon is enraged to discover that he is neglecting his job to spend time with Kate and the baby.

programme.title: Heartbeat
programme.desc: Nick struggles to combine fatherhood with full-time police work until his mum comes to the rescue. Meanwhile, Greengrass sets up a darts match with high stakes.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. The departure of Dr Dibbs sees Martin move back into his old surgery and agree to stay for a couple of months until a replacement can be appointed - determined to get to grips with fatherhood, he asks Louisa to move into his house so he can help to raise their child and even suggests that Louisa and the baby could move to London with him. Louisa reluctantly agrees to move into the Doc's house and offers to help with reception duties as Pauline has left, but she is none too sure about the move to London as she had hoped to resume her career as headmistress of the village school - meanwhile, Portwenn packs out the village church for the funeral of the Doc's Aunt Joan. As the villagers are shocked when Martin's eulogy becomes a health warning about the dangers to the heart of eating the wrong food, Joan's sister Ruth attends the funeral and demonstrates the same cantankerous character as her nephew after learning that she is to inherit Joan's house and farm.

programme.title: Doc Martin
programme.desc: Comedy-drama series. Sleepless nights take their toll on Martin and Louisa as they try to find ways to comfort their constantly wailing baby, and Aunt Ruth deals with an intruder on the farm who has stolen the hubcaps from her car - when the thief is identified as Michael Dunwich, who lives with his mother Shirley, Ruth decides to pay a visit to the mother and her son. It soon becomes clear to psychiatrist Ruth that Michael is a bit odd as he has a collection of metal objects strewn around the garden - meanwhile, Shirley makes an appointment with Martin to discuss crippling stomach pains that she has been suffering from. When her son is out of the room, Shirley tells the Doc that she thinks that her son is trying to poison her so he can have the house to himself - elsewhere, new receptionist Morwenna Newcross fails to make a good impression by arriving late on her first day, appearing to be hyperactive, and getting sacked when Martin alleges that she is high on drugs.

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Detective drama series based on novels by Peter Robinson. DCI Banks is drawn into the criminal underworld of Soho when he reluctantly accepts an unofficial request from Chief Superintendent Rydell to find Rydell's missing daughter - with only an internet lead to go on, can Banks find Emily and persuade her to come home? Meanwhile, an armed robbery in Eastvale turns into a murder investigation after the thief is found brutally executed in his own home - DS Annie Cabbot struggles to identify credible suspects, but she and Banks come to a devastating realisation when another body is found.

programme.title: DCI Banks
programme.desc: Conclusion of a two-part story. With the discovery of a body in the nightclub, Banks finds himself at the heart of a murder investigation with any number of suspects and many unanswered questions - when a surveillance operation establishes a clear link between Barry Clough and the murder of Charles McKay, Banks and Cabbot realise that the two cases must be connected. The investigation then takes a number of alarming twists which push the detectives' relationship to breaking point and reveal a shocking secret within their own team.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Lewis and Hathaway investigate the death of Professor Miranda Thornton after she apparently killed herself when her dating video was leaked onto a vicious media blog - Lewis does not believe that Thornton's death was suicide and has qualms about Kit Renton, the blog's founder, and Sophie Leland, the owner of the dating website. When one of Renton's employees is found murdered, the police realise she must have been killed because she knew something about Thornton's death - as Lewis finds that Thornton, Renton and Leland were all at Oxford together 20 years before, he realises that this is actually an age-old revenge story...

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Enduring '70s British sitcom about a chirpy driver and his conductor pal who torment the long-suffering inspector of the Luxton Bus Company. When Stan finds that living at home is cramping his love life, he decides to move out and rent a room.

programme.title: On the Buses
programme.desc: Sitcom about a bus driver and his conductor pal. The inspector puts a new recruit on Jack's bus for training knowing that she will drive him mad with her nagging.

programme.title: Wycliffe: The Cycle of Death
programme.desc: The pilot episode of the popular West Country detective drama series based on the books by WJ Burley. When a bookshop owner in Penzance is brutally murdered, Wycliffe discovers that all is not well among the members of one of the area's most respected families.

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: Lewis and Hathaway enter the archaic world of St Gerard's Hall when a visiting female bishop is found dead after drinking poisoned wine - was she was murdered because her liberal views contradicted those of the reactionary religious leaders of the college? When another two deaths occur and both mirror macabre murders from Jacobean revenge tragedy, Lewis and Hathaway realise that the motive is much more convoluted...

programme.title: Lewis
programme.desc: When a student dies during a clinical trial for a controversial new anti-depressant drug, is her death murder or suicide? Lewis and Hathaway investigate and, as the body count rises, uncover a web of lies, jealousy and madness that Lewis himself could fall victim to.

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Crime thriller featuring the author's much-loved spinster sleuth. Gwenda Halliday has never been to England before - when she moves into the house of her dreams, she begins to have ghostly apparitions. On discovering that Gwenda grew up in the house as a child, the mystery takes a more sinister edge as she and Miss Marple realise that an unsolved murder was committed in the house.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby's secret past as a British agent comes back to haunt him after a grisly murder in Midsomer Parva. A pleasant afternoon at a cricket match turns ugly when former county-cricketer - and ex-spy - Geoffrey Larkin is found gashed to death. Locals blame the 'beast of Midsomer', but Barnaby is unconvinced, especially when he discovers that umpire and retired spymaster Malcolm Frazer is using his home, Allenby House, as a safe house. Soon Barnaby discovers links to a spy ring that operated in Berlin during the Cold War, but his investigation is obstructed at every turn, and it seems as though shady dealings are still going on at Allenby House. Then there is another murder - can Barnaby solve the crime before any people get hurt? And will his police career survive a run-in with MI6? Guest starring Peter Davison, Alice Krige and Anna Massey.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: When octogenarian Felicity Law puts a recently discovered piece by local landscape artist Henry Hogson up for auction, the painting causes a fierce bidding war. But soon after the sale, Felicity is found tortured and killed. She had announced that she would give the proceeds of the sale to the Arnold Simms School of Art, a school that helps criminals and which had recently lost its funding. Barnaby enlists Simms' art teacher daughter Matilda to help him navigate the local art world. He soon finds many tangled relationships between teachers, dealers and buyers. Things get more complicated when a Hogson masterpiece is stolen and Matilda's former lover Graham Spate offers another Hogson to greedy art dealer Anthony Prideaux. Then the death count begins to rise. The key to the case seems to be Matilda's 'little black book' - but can Barnaby and Jones find the book and catch the killer before anyone else gets hurt?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Midsomer University clashes with big business when science fellow George Jeffers threatens to go public with what he believes is a potentially lethal software glitch in a new air traffic control system. American software boss Clinton Finn fears he will lose millions if the truth comes out and puts pressure on the University authorities. But when village schoolteacher Emily Harte is killed by a hit-and-run driver, Barnaby wonders if Jeffers was the real target.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: The body of a local troublemaker and lothario is found dead in the model village which is the chief tourist attraction of Little Worthy.

programme.title: Grace
programme.desc: As Grace navigates the aftermath of Sandy’s suicide, his newfound son Bruno, and a profound personal loss in his and Cleo’s life, his team is called to a Sussex beach when an unidentified male body washes up dead in a barrel. The very same morning, Brighton football stadium receives a chilling anonymous demand and is faced with an impossible decision. Roy, who is at the match bonding with Bruno, now finds himself locked in a frantic race to save hundreds of lives, which comes at great personal risk. But the day’s terrifying events are only just beginning when an eerie CCTV discovery comes to light, leading Grace to believe that the family of a wealthy club shareholder is being targeted. The question is why. When forensics on the body from the beach indicate that the victim may in fact be linked to events at the stadium, in order to save an innocent life from imminent death, Grace must enter a cruel world of corruption, where normal rules don’t apply, and human lives have no value.

programme.title: A Touch of Frost
programme.desc: The second part of a two-part story which closes the book on this long-running series. The past is catching up with Frost in more ways than one as a series of copycat crimes convinces Superintendent Mullett that his veteran DI's life is in danger - there are now two killers to bring to justice, but that will not happen until tragedy strikes.

programme.title: Rosemary & Thyme
programme.desc: Light-hearted drama series about a pair of gardening enthusiasts-turned-amateur sleuths. When Rosemary and Laura answer a call from Professor James Mullins as he is having problems with an unknown blight on his beloved allotment, the girls find themselves caught up in his fight to stop the land being sold to developers - although he is blind, James is still as sharp as ever and lives a fiercely independent lifestyle with the help of his guide dog Tiberius. After a particularly bitter allotment committee meeting, Rosemary and Laura arrive to take some soil samples but instead find James lying dead in a deep pit - Jangles, a vagrant who lives in a nearby caravan, saw no-one and the police assume that the blind man simply fell. Not believing that it was an accident, Rosemary and Laura stake out the place at night to find the culprit... but instead discover drugs, another death, and dangerous dealings in high finance.

programme.title: Rosemary & Thyme
programme.desc: Light-hearted drama series about a pair of gardening enthusiasts-turned-amateur sleuths. Rosemary and Laura are asked to bring Baffington Churchyard back to its former glory in time for a medieval fair - at its heart is an ancient yew tree which makes Laura feel edgy because it's known as the tree of death. Nearby Brockett's Farm, owned by Marie Sutton, is in high demand - local landowner Franklin Danvers wants to turn it into a medieval agricultural museum, but bidding against him is Redland Linton from herbal remedy company Knussens, who hope to use bark from the farm's extensive yew plantation to produce a natural cure for cancer. When Marie's brother Malcolm bursts into a public meeting after an absence of several years and announces his plans to sell the farm to housing developers, Rosemary and Laura arrive to start work the next morning and find Malcolm killed by an arrow. With a village full of suspects, the pair realise that the killing is as much about unrequited love as land.

programme.title: McDonald & Dodds
programme.desc: Detective drama series following two detectives who seemingly have nothing in common but are thrown together and forge a rumbustious partnership in Bath. In a case of social media versus reality, a lifestyle influencer dies during a routine nose job, leaving McDonald and Dodds to separate the fact from fiction.

programme.title: Agatha Christie's Marple
programme.desc: Crime thriller featuring the author's much-loved spinster sleuth. Lymstock is a town with more than its share of shameful secrets, a town where even a sudden outbreak of anonymous hate mail causes only a minor stir - however, Miss Marple believes that there is more to the case than meets the eye when Mona Symmington takes her own life as a result of one of the letters. The town is thrown into turmoil as the letters become ever more deadly - someone local must be responsible, so can anyone be trusted?

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: A housebreaker known as 'the Creeper' is terrorising the villages, and the latest victim is Chief Constable Richard Lovell. Meanwhile, Jack Filby holds a dinner party at upper-crust Chettham Park House - but the evening proves fatal for one guest. When Barnaby and Jones investigate, they find a group of friends whose ties to a local gangster and the Chief Constable go back to the 1960s. While the detectives try to dig up more information, the burglaries and murders continue - and it looks as though the Creeper knows plenty of secrets that others would rather stayed hidden.

programme.title: Midsomer Murders
programme.desc: Barnaby investigates the case of a four-member syndicate who own a racehorse. Two members are desperate to sell the horse and two are determined to keep it, then one of them is murdered.

programme.desc: Another case in the classic drama series starring Jeremy Brett as Arthur Conan Doyle's legendary sleuth. An ailing Foreign Office clerk asks Holmes to retrieve a document about a highly sensitive treaty between Britain and Italy that an opportunistic thief has stolen from his desk.

programme.title: Made in Britain

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: Napoleonic War-based action-adventure. Winter 1813 - Wellington is informed by the debonair Comte de Maquerre that Bordeaux is ready to rebel against Napoleon, but Wellington's spymaster Ross is suspicious and tests Maquerre by suggesting that they use Maquerre's own castle as a base. Maquerre reluctantly agrees but says that the castle is in Napoleon's hands, so Wellington appoints Colonel Bampfylde to lead the attack on the castle with Sharpe in support. Bampfylde, who is intent on glory, sends Sharpe on a scouting mission and tries to capture the castle on his own, but he fails and casualties are heavy - Sharpe, who is a witness to the carnage, therefore has Harris and Frederickson sneak into the castle in disguise, and they soon force the French to surrender once inside. Ashamed by Sharpe's victory, Bampfylde sends him off on a reconnaissance mission - however, Sharpe soon discovers that Bordeaux has no intention of rising against Napoleon and that Maquerre is a double agent.

programme.title: Sharpe
programme.desc: Napoleonic War-based action-adventure. France 1813 - the war is entering its final stages and the French formulate a desperate plan to capture Wellington's spymaster Major General Ross. Sharpe is ordered by Wellington to accompany Colonel Brand, who is intent on destroying the French main powder supply in the caves of Rocha - Wellington and Ross are both suspicious of Brand's loyalty, but they do not reveal this to Sharpe. The suspicions are well-founded as Brand secretly meets the French and makes plans for capturing Ross - meanwhile, Sharpe's wife on the home front is showing signs of being bored with Army life and enjoys the attentions of a young poet.

programme.title: ITV Racing: Sky Bet Sunday Series

programme.title: A View to a Kill
programme.desc: The 14th entry in the James Bond film series and the last to star Roger Moore as the secret agent. When James Bond is sent to investigate a security leak at high-tech company Zorin Industries, he discovers a hotbed of murder and deception - Max Zorin, the company's mysterious owner has devised a plan to corner the world's microchip market... even if he has to kill millions to do it. Before Bond can stop Zorin, he must confront the madman's beautiful and deadly companion May Day - with help from geologist Stacey Sutton, Bond launches an all-out assault on Zorin's deadly scheme that concludes with a treacherous duel on the upper spans of the Golden Gate Bridge.

programme.title: The Taking of Pelham 123
programme.desc: Thrilling crime action remake of the classic 1974 film The Taking of Pelham One Two Three. Four armed men hijack a subway train in Manhattan one early afternoon in New York City - their leader is called Ryder, and he connects by phone with Walter Garber, a dispatcher who is watching the train's line and who has been temporarily demoted from a supervisor position while being investigated for bribery. Ryder then demands ten million dollars within one hour... or else will start shooting hostages.

programme.title: Hotel Transylvania: Transformania
programme.desc: A science experiment goes wrong: Johnny becomes a monster while others turn human. Now the group must find a way to reverse it before it's permanent.

programme.title: Bad Boys: Ride Or Die
programme.desc: Miami detectives, defying protocol, investigate their captain's murder, uncovering a dangerous conspiracy of corruption and cartel involvement, seeking justice and vindication.

programme.title: Venom
programme.desc: Terrorists attempt to kidnap a wealthy child. Their plan is foiled when a deadly black mamba is sent instead of a harmless snake.

programme.title: Men In Black: International
programme.desc: When aliens that have the ability to shape-shift into humans arrive on Earth, Agent H joins forces with Agent M, a new recruit, to save the planet.

programme.title: Harold & The Purple Crayon
programme.desc: Harold, who can make drawings come alive in a book, becomes a real-world adult and learns he has to understand more about everyday real life.

programme.title: Hancock
programme.desc: An unconventional superhero's heroics never fail to leave jaw-dropping damage in their wake until a PR executive comes along.

programme.title: Gran Turismo
programme.desc: Underdogs risk everything to compete in the world's top sport.

programme.title: Vertical Limit
programme.desc: Peter Garrett, finds himself in a challenging position when his sister and her team get trapped in a icy cave atop the world's 2nd highest mountain, K2.

programme.title: The Adventures of Tintin
programme.desc: Follow the exploits of Tintin, his dog Snowy, Captain Haddock and Thomson and Thompson, on their adventures around the world.

programme.title: Insidious: Chapter 2
programme.desc: In this horror film, the Lambert family seeks to uncover the haunting childhood secret that has left them dangerously connected to the evil spirits.

programme.title: Maharaja
programme.desc: Kohinoor is back to reclaim his kingdom, but things get messy when Ranbir kidnaps his nanny. Can Kohinoor rescue her and secure his throne? Adventure awaits!

programme.title: Sansar
programme.desc: A family faces tough times and strained relationships, but the determined leading lady steps up to bring everyone back together and heal their bonds.

programme.title: Ek Rishta- The Bond of Love
programme.desc: Ajay steps up to shield his family from the wicked schemes of his brother-in-law, diving headfirst into danger to keep his loved ones safe and sound.

programme.title: Zakhmi Sipahi
programme.desc: Shakti, an honest police officer, sets out to avenge his father's death. Along the way, he faces numerous trials and tribulations that test his courage, resolve, and sense of justice.

programme.title: Pardes
programme.desc: Kishorilal arranges his westernized son's marriage to Ganga, brought from India to the USA, where Ganga forms a deeper connection with Kishorilal's foster son, Arjun.

programme.title: Insan
programme.desc: Amjad and his mother joyfully welcome estranged brother Munna home, unaware he is Azhar Khan, a dangerous extremist whose return brings hidden threats to their lives.

programme.title: Barsaat (1995)
programme.desc: Badal and Tina's love faces major hurdles when her dad disapproves and unjustly locks Badal up for a crime he didn't commit. Can their love survive this tough situation?

programme.title: Dance Party
programme.desc: Sweety questions her love after seeing Sanjay's true colors at a party.

programme.title: Tirchhi Topiwale
programme.desc: Opposed lovers, Maya and Raj, find their paths when her parents' chosen suitor falls for someone else.

programme.title: No Entry
programme.desc: Faithful husband Kishan faces constant suspicion from his wife Kaajal. His friend Prem, a habitual cheater, introduces him to Bobby, a prostitute, shaking up their moral worlds and friendships.

programme.title: Aitraaz
programme.desc: In a twisted legal battle, a man faces a sexual harassment lawsuit after his boss's wife claims he raped her. It's a tense showdown of truths as the jury decides.

programme.title: Mard
programme.desc: After a cruel betrayal, Azad, a king, is imprisoned by General Dyer. His son embarks on a quest to liberate him and restore peace to their kingdom.

programme.title: Jaal The Trap
programme.desc: Ajay kidnaps Anita, the home minister's daughter, to save his girlfriend Neha from terrorists. During the daring rescue, he uncovers a shocking secret that changes everything.

programme.title: Indian
programme.desc: DCP Raj Shekhar Azad nabs terrorist Wasim Khan, but uncovers deep police corruption involving his father-in-law. Framed for murder, he must clear his name and fight for justice.

programme.title: Jurmana
programme.desc: Inder bets he can win Rama's heart. She falls for him, unaware of the wager. A sudden twist forces her to leave, changing both their lives forever.

programme.title: Moksha Salvation
programme.desc: Vikram and Ritika plan to rob a bank to fund their business of providing free legal services to impoverished people. However, things get complicated when she is found dead.

programme.title: Hafta Vasuli
programme.desc: After losing an election, a corrupt MLA faces betrayal from his partner-in-crime. Determined to seek revenge, he embarks on a dangerous journey to reclaim his power.

programme.title: Toofan
programme.desc: Archana and Manik's sons-Ranju, Raja, and Rabi-split apart due to Mona's schemes. After great costs, fate reunites the family at last.

programme.title: Chaalbaaz
programme.desc: Separated twins Anju and Manju swap lives by chance. Shy Anju adapts to rural life, while bold Manju seeks revenge against their cruel uncle for past wrongs.

programme.title: Nadiya Ke Paar
programme.desc: Chandan loves Gunja, but after her sister's tragic death, tradition demands she marry his brother. Torn between love and duty, Gunja faces a heartbreaking choice that could change everything.

programme.title: Phool Aur Angaar
programme.desc: Love with Sudha Verma entangles a middle-class professor in a gangsters' world, leading to murder and mayhem.

programme.title: Judaai
programme.desc: Kajal, craving luxury, marries Raj but accepts Janhvi's ?2 crore to let her marry him instead, leading to unexpected twists in their relationships.

programme.title: Sandwich
programme.desc: Shekar's feelings for Nisha hit a snag when his sister's wedding depends on him marrying someone else. Love and family ties clash, making for a messy romantic dilemma!

programme.title: Ghajini
programme.desc: A carefree young man's antics lead to hilarious confusion as he juggles love, lies and unexpected twists in a rib-tickling comedy.

programme.title: Kabzaa (1988)
programme.desc: Ravi's heart changes after Ali saves him, leading him to fight Veljibhai.

programme.title: Daraar
programme.desc: Suspicion and fear poison a marriage as love turns to hatred, and betrayal pushes two lives into a dangerous spiral of obsession and revenge.

programme.title: Baaghi
programme.desc: Baaghi

programme.title: Jai Ho
programme.desc: Starring: Salman Khan,Tabu. Jai leaves the army to inspire apathetic citizens. His movement catches fire, but a clash with an influential political family threatens everything he's built.

programme.title: Real Tevar
programme.desc: Starring: Aamani,Jagapathi Babu. Harsha, a millionaire's son, meets Charuseela and reaches a remote village, deciding to develop it, discovering purpose, love, responsibility, and values beyond wealth.

programme.title: Veera The Power
programme.desc: Starring: Vishal, Dimple Hayathi. Porus wants to be a cop, but his sister's death changes everything. Now, he hunts for justice with fierce determination-no badge, just grit.

programme.title: Jaat
programme.desc: Starring: Sunny Deol,Randeep Hooda and Regina Cassandra. A stranger's clash with Varadaraja Ranatunga's men in a coastal village exposes the locals' misery and begins a battle for justice.

programme.title: The Bhootnii
programme.desc: Starring: Sanjay Dutt,Sunny Singh. A ghost at St. Vincent's College manifests yearly at the Virgin Tree on Valentine's Day, turning a symbol of yearning into terror and compelling a para-physicist to investigate its sinister origins.

programme.title: Good Newwz
programme.desc: Starring: Akshay Kumar,Kareena Kapoor Khan. Two couples with the same surnames undergo in vitro fertilization, but things get complicated when they discover that their sperms have been mixed up.

programme.title: The Power Of 3 Jai Luv Kush
programme.desc: Starring: Jr. NTR,Ronit Roy. Triplets Jai, Lava, and Kusa, separated young, follow diverse paths, Jai turns evil, Kusa a crook, and Lava becomes a bank manager.

programme.title: Movie
programme.desc: Movie

programme.title: Khatta Meetha
programme.desc: Starring: Akshay Kumar,Johny Lever. A small-time contractor faces relentless corruption, political pressure, & personal humiliation while trying to complete honest road projects. His fight exposes the absurdities of a system

programme.title: Hum Saath Saath Hain
programme.desc: Starring: Salman Khan,Sonali Bendre. A joint Indian family faces trials as Ramkishen and Mamta raise their children. Mamta's ambition drives a division, but her sons oppose her, leading to family conflict and revelations.

programme.title: Sankranti Ko Anne Vaale Hai
programme.desc: Starring: Venkatesh,Aishwarya Rajesh. After a famous tech entrepreneur is kidnapped on her return to India, a police officer seeks help from her ex-boyfriend, a former cop now living a quiet family life.

programme.title: Khoonkhar
programme.desc: Starring: Bellamkonda Sreenivas,Rakul Preet Singh. Gagan and Sweety fall in love but are forced to break up because her father disapproves of him. While defending a family from thugs one day, Gagan unknowingly saves Sweety and vows to protect her.

programme.title: Skanda
programme.desc: Starring: Ram Pothineni,Sreeleela. Renowned for martial arts, a young man is recruited by a secret agency. His mission: confront terrorists, face danger, and fight bravely to safeguard peace and innocent lives.

programme.title: Attack
programme.desc: Starring: Manchu Manoj,Jagapati Babu. Guru Raj, a powerful businessman, is killed and one of his three sons, Kaali, vows to find the culprit. When he is also killed, Radha, Kaali's brother, vows to uncover the killer and exact revenge.

programme.desc: Starring: Raghava Lawrence,Oviya. Raghava, a young man fearful of ghosts, enjoys a happy life with his family until a trip to Coimbatore results in his possession by a vengeful spirit.

programme.title: Dabangg 2
programme.desc: Starring: Salman Khan,Sonakshi Sinha. Chulbul Pandey, a rebellious cop, slays a politician's brother. Retaliation ensues as the politician's henchmen target Chulbul's wife, igniting his fury.

programme.title: Singham Again
programme.desc: Starring: Ajay DevgnKareena KapoorDeepika Padukone. Inspired by the Ramayana, Singham and allies face a mysterious foe in a perilous quest to rescue his wife, driven by courage and devotion.

programme.title: Tees Maar Khan
programme.desc: Starring: Aadi Saikumar,Payal Rajput. Having escaped from abusive households, Tees Maar Khan and Vasudha form a familial bond. Years later, a tragedy involving the mafia leaves Tees Maar Khan vying for revenge.

programme.title: Arya - Ek Deewana
programme.desc: Starring: Allu Arjun,Anuradha Mehta. Childhood friends Ajay and Arya, now on different paths, reunite and vie for the same woman's love, unraveling buried secrets.

programme.title: Anjaana
programme.desc: Raju, Garage mechanic falls in love with a rich girl but her guardian opposes the marriage. Then Raju decides to con him to teach him a lesson.

programme.title: Khol De Meri Zuban
programme.desc: Lalloo, a mute servant, regains his voice and is offered in marriage to Lali, the Zamindar's unlucky, twice-widowed daughter, by his determined mother, who sees an opportunity for a better life.

programme.title: Mehboob Ki Mehndi
programme.desc: Shabana is employed by Yusuf, a rich man, to teach his nephew. Eventually, Yusuf and Shabana fall in love and plan to get married. But the girl has a troubled past that may destroy her future.

programme.title: Coolie
programme.desc: Seema, the daughter of a wealthy businessman, falls in love with Shiba, a labourer. Complications arise when Seema's father refuses to accept their relationship.

programme.title: Jheel Ke Us Paar
programme.desc: Sameer, the beloved son of a rich man, falls in love with Neelu, a beautiful blind girl. A touching romance unfolds against family expectations.

programme.title: Chalti Ka Naam Gaadi
programme.desc: The Sharma brothers run a garage with a strict 'no women' rule. Two brothers fall in love, hiding it from their boxing brother. Secrets and arranged marriages complicate everything.

programme.title: Sadhu Aur Shaitaan
programme.desc: Naive taxi driver Bajrang helps others but gets caught in a robbery scheme. As chaos unfolds, he and Sadhuram must prove their innocence before it's too late.
